context.prompt:
Build cx: an AI-native code management CLI tool that operates on top of git.

The tool provides structured context management for AI-assisted coding by treating AI sessions as first-class citizens. Key design decisions:

1. Rust single-binary distribution (clap + serde + sha2 + chrono)
2. Branch-based session tracking — no global state file, active session inferred from current git branch name
3. Turn-indexed snapshot filenames (1.json, 2.json) — the nth commit on the session branch = the nth snapshot
4. .cx/ metadata is tracked by git — survives clone, no metadata loss on merge
5. Content-addressed SID (SHA-256) for integrity checking (not used as filename)
6. Intent-based review grouping: feature / fix / refactor / chore / etc.

Commands: init, start, apply (with --intent), status, end (--merge/--abandon), log, review

semantic_units.description: Initial import of all cx source files
